name: Brown Sugar Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the flour, brown sugar, and salt in a large bowl.
2. Cut in the butter until the mixture resembles fine crumbs.
3. Spread 2 1/2 cups of the mixture into the bottom of a greased 11x7x2-inch pan.
4. Blend the baking soda and nutmeg with the remaining ingredients in another bowl.
5. Combine the beaten egg and sour cream, then stir into the crumb mixture until just blended.
6. Spoon the batter over the crumbs and spread evenly.
7. Sprinkle nuts on top.
8. Bake at 350°F for 40 minutes.
